scripts.build: next build && node postbuild.js && echo '[POSTBUILD] Copying static assets...' && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && echo '[POSTBUILD] Creating restart trigger...' && mkdir -p .next/standalone/tmp && touch .next/standalone/tmp/restart.txt && echo '[POSTBUILD] Done!'
